title: Crash when opening another connection after minimizing a full-screen RDP session
author: yasinvs
body_snippet:
**Title:** Application crashes when opening another connection after minimizing a full-screen RDP session

**Description**
When an RDP session is opened in full-screen mode and then minimized, the application crashes if I try to open another connection afterward.

**Version**
mRemoteNG 1.78.2 (Nightly Build 3405) x64

**Steps to Reproduce**

1. Open an RDP connection.
2. Switch the RDP session to full-screen mode.
3. Minimize the session (or minimize the mRemoteNG window).
4. Attempt to open ano...
notes: RDP fullscreen crash: COM events fire on non-UI thread; _frmMain accessed without IsDisposed check and without InvokeRequired marshaling. Fixed by: (1) wrapping Fullscreen/SmartSize restore in try/catch, (2) marshaling RestoreAfterFullscreen to UI thread via BeginInvoke, (3) adding IsDisposed+IsHandleCreated guards, (4) catching ObjectDisposedException in enter-fullscreen async task.
